name: Chocolate Mint Dessert
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons green creme de menthe or see substitute
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Grease a 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, sugar, butter, eggs, and syrup; beat until smooth.
4. Pour batter into prepared pan.
5. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes or until the top springs back when touched lightly in the center.
6. Cool completely in the pan on a wire rack.
7. Spread Mint Cream Center over the cooled cake.
8. Cover; refrigerate.
9. In a small saucepan over very low heat, melt butter or margarine and chocolate chips. Remove from heat; stir until smooth.
10. Pour Chocolate Glaze over chilled dessert. Stir until smooth.
11. Cover; refrigerate at least 1 hour before serving.
12. Cover leftover dessert.
Mint Cream Center Instructions:
1. In a small mixing bowl, combine powdered sugar, butter or margarine, and creme de menthe or substitute; beat until smooth.
Chocolate Glaze Instructions:
1. In a small saucepan over very low heat, melt butter or margarine and chocolate chips. Remove from heat; stir until smooth.
2. Cool slightly.
